query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `interactions` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `leadId` int NOT NULL, `type` enum('note','email','call','meeting','booking','stage_change','system') NOT NULL, `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL, `body` text, `metadata` json, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `interactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bookings` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `callTypeId` int NOT NULL, `leadId` int, `firstName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `lastName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `phone` varchar(32), `company` varchar(256), `message` text, `scheduledDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL, `scheduledTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL, `timezone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'America/Los_Angeles', `status` enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', `confirmationToken` varchar(128), `adminNotes` text, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `bookings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bookings` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `callTypeId` int NOT NULL, `leadId` int, `firstName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `lastName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `phone` varchar(32), `company` varchar(256), `message` text, `scheduledDate` varchar(16) NOT NULL, `scheduledTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL, `timezone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'America/Los_Angeles', `status` enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', `confirmationToken` varchar(128), `adminNotes` text, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `bookings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
